final_response:
Great! The service account setup script has been executed successfully. The script has:

1. Created a monitoring service account
2. Added a monitoring-daemon user
3. Set up the account for your monitoring daemon

The restricted service account is now ready to be used. If you need to verify the details of the created account or make any additional configurations, let me know!
